entity.label: Moseroth
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Bonds, one of the stations in the wilderness (Num. 33:30, 31), probably the same as Mosera.

nodes.label: Moseroth
nodes.description: Bonds, one of the stations in the wilderness (Num. 33:30, 31), probably the same as Mosera.

verses.text: And they departed from Hashmonah, and encamped at Moseroth.
And they departed from Moseroth, and pitched in Benejaakan.
